text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I go see a movie to relax, and when I<n>come out...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
H-hello. You're a trainer from the<n>academy,
right? Did you also happen<n>to watch this movie?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
R-really?! If you don't mind, I'd love<n>to know
what you thought of it.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for asking all of a sudden. It's<n>just... this
movie is based off one of<n>my favorite books.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I'm so happy it got a movie<n>adaptation, I can't
help but want to<n>know what others thought of it!
choice_data_list: That final car chase was amazing.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Yes! That scene had me at the edge<n>of my seat
too!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
It's no wonder speed and tension are<n>such
important elements for movies...
choice_data_list: They sure make things exciting, huh?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes, you're right! I feel like I've<n>learned
something new.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
By the way, in the novel, the hero and<n>heroine
originally confessed to each<n>other while fleeing
on foot...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
But I think the scene gained a lot<n>more presence
after being changed to<n>a car chase. The stunt
driving was<n>breathtaking as well!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I wish they focused more on the<n>subtleties of
their emotions, though.<n>For example, they
could've<n>abandoned the car and gone on foot<n>
so that...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
O-oh! Sorry for rambling... I didn't<n>mean to get so
carried away!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Zenno Rob Roy's fangirling is just as<n>fast-paced
and action-packed as the<n>film.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I know just what you mean! The<n>visuals were
stunning, and they<n>perfectly captured the world
and<n>atmosphere that was in the book.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
The musical score was a perfect<n>accompaniment
too. Listening to it<n>really refreshed me.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
In fact, I feel so energized, I'm sure I<n>can do my
very best during training<n>tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
And the more I train, the stronger I'll<n>become,
which means I'm sure to do<n>well in my next
race!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
And if I keep winning, my life will<n>become its own
story...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Then someone will write a book about<n>me, and
it'll get its own movie<n>adaptation, and...
choice_data_list: I'll go see it if they make a movie of your life.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Gasp! No way... Did I say all thatout loud?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Aaaaah! Please forget everything I<n>said!
